learnerInstructions: Use the terminal to complete the task.
Use pwd and ls to inspect your current location.
Use mkdir, touch, cp, mv, rm, cat, head, tail, and wc only when the lesson asks for them.
Use the file explorer only to confirm folders and files appear; do not rely on the editor for Course 1 terminal tasks.
Click Check Answer when the workspace matches the goal.
notes: Linux Terminal Fundamentals is terminal-only: the editor should be hidden for Course 1 code_input tasks.
Independent quiz/check questions should use per-exercise terminal workspaces so starter files are fresh for each exercise.
Only a deliberate project/capstone flow should share one workspace across multiple steps.
